title: MORI Cellular Blanket Grey Organic Cotton Bamboo 70x100cm
features: Luxuriously Soft & Breathable – Crafted from a premium blend of 50% bamboo viscose and 50% cotton, the MORI Cellular Blanket offers exceptional breathability and temperature regulation. The smart cellular weave traps warmth in winter while ensuring airflow for a cooling effect in summer.

Gentle Comfort for Delicate Skin – Designed with your newborn’s sensitive skin in mind, this ultra-soft baby blanket delivers a snug, soothing embrace. The bamboo-cotton blend provides a silky, lightweight touch that keeps your baby feeling secure during swaddling, naptime, or cuddle sessions.

Perfect for Swaddling & Everyday Use – Generously sized at 70x100 cm, this versatile cellular blanket is perfect for newborn swaddling, offering a womb-like sense of security for better sleep and reduced fussiness. Its breathable design ensures optimal temperature control, keeping your little one cozy yet cool.

Year-Round Comfort & Versatility – The intelligent airflow design makes this the ultimate all-season baby blanket. Whether used in a cot, pram, Moses basket, or during travel, it prevents overheating in summer and locks in warmth during colder months, making it an essential nursery staple.

Premium Craftsmanship & Durability – A testament to MORI Baby’s commitment to quality, this expertly woven cellular blanket is designed for lasting softness and durability. The eco-conscious bamboo-cotton blend withstands frequent washing while maintaining its plush texture, ensuring years of luxurious comfort for your baby.
